issues.description: The L-072-1 lesson overclaimed that a verification-only pass over an already-built solution 'closes the small snippet-fittable diff confound for free'. verification-surface-strategy.md SS8 correctly qualifies this to LARGE/cross-file diffs; the lesson generalized it to any already-built solution without the qualifier (an L-065-1 propagate-the-qualifier-to-every-echo miss).
issues.resolution_notes: Qualified the lesson wording to match SS8: an already-built solution WITH A LARGE/CROSS-FILE DIFF closes the confound for free; a small built target does not (the confound closes only when the real diff is genuinely non-snippet-fittable). Applied the verifier's verbatim suggested correction. Per the Set 071 materiality discipline this is a Minor accuracy nit (no merge-decision/code impact, no plausible path to harm), so the round is non-blocking (effectively VERIFIED) and was not re-verified to avoid L-071-1 nit-churn; fixed because it improves the accuracy of a lesson future sets will cite.
